positions.title: Software Developement Technical Lead
positions.summary: As a Software Developer Technical Lead, in Benefits Outsourcing, Allen collaborated with a diverse cross-functional and international team, both in-person and virtually, to develop and maintain a benefit administration system.

positions.title: Software Developer
positions.summary: As a Software Developer, in Benefits Delivery and Administration (BDA), Allen collaborates with a diverse cross-functional and international team, both in-person and virtually, to develop and maintain a benefit administration system - BenefitConnect.
